name: Railroad Retirement Tax Exclusion for Fringe Benefits

eligibility.description: Applies to benefits provided to railroad employees that are already excludable from gross income under IRC sections 74(c), 108(f)(4), 117, or 132.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes qualified fringe benefits (such as working condition fringes, de minimis fringes, and qualified tuition reductions) from the definition of compensation for RRTA tax purposes.
